dhan_token_status.worker_side: Worker's own token watchdog reported 'Token OK - 12.00h remaining' at 06:22 and 06:52 UTC (11:52/12:22 IST) via its own successful TOTP-based refresh.
dhan_token_status.web_side: Web service's own independent token refresh (it also runs refresh_token() at startup, separate from the worker's) has succeeded as of this snapshot (connected:true, error:null) - was previously TOKEN_EXPIRED_OR_INVALID earlier in this session before a restart-triggered refresh succeeded.
dhan_token_status.architecture_gap_found: Web and worker each maintain their OWN independent copy of DHAN_ACCESS_TOKEN and each independently calls refresh_token() - there is no mechanism for the worker's successfully-refreshed token to propagate to the web service, or vice versa. Each side can independently go stale between its own refresh attempts. Not fixed this session (would require a new sync mechanism); documented as a real finding, not silently patched.

totp_race_fix_confirmation.pr_49_totp_window_fix: Deployed and confirmed working - production logs after deploy showed no more 'Invalid TOTP' errors (previously caused by generating a TOTP code with <5s left in its validity window).
totp_race_fix_confirmation.pr_50_lock_race_fix: Deployed. Confirmed the specific double-call-within-0.3s race this fixed no longer reproduces in logs checked this session.
totp_race_fix_confirmation.once_every_2_minutes_error: Was observed once during this session (immediately after the credential-sync redeploy, before the lock-race fix's atomic check-and-mark took effect in a fresh boot) - not observed in the most recent logs checked.

pr_52_timezone_fix_confirmation.evidence: POST /api/scheduler/health/push no longer crashes with NameError: name 'timezone' is not defined. GET /api/scheduler/health showed received:true with real job data after the fix deployed, versus received:false / worker-never-pushed before.

no_duplicate_token_refresh_race: Confirmed via PR #50 fix and absence of the 'once every 2 minutes' error in the most recent log window checked.
secrets_redaction: All log excerpts and evidence in this report and throughout this session were reviewed with actual token/PIN/TOTP/secret VALUES never printed or included - only keys, presence booleans, lengths, and status strings.
